description: Curated 12-template pack for the four recurring attribute checks used in the narrative pipeline.

attributes.name: 身手
attributes.summary: Physical skill, reflexes, timing, movement, and precise execution under pressure.

games.title: QTE Boss Parry
games.gameplayDescription: Read the enemy wind-up, parry inside a short timing window, and chain successful counters to survive escalating pressure.
games.fitReason: Best for direct confrontation, protecting someone, or winning a close-range clash through pure combat skill.

games.title: Lane Dash
games.gameplayDescription: Switch lanes quickly to dodge hazards and keep sprinting as speed ramps up.
games.fitReason: Captures body control, evasive movement, and the fantasy of escaping danger through fast reactions.

games.title: Cannon Aim
games.gameplayDescription: Adjust aim and timing to hit moving targets or a critical point with precision.
games.fitReason: Adds a precision-strike branch so ATK can represent accurate execution, not only speed or dodging.

attributes.name: 意志
attributes.summary: Restraint, composure, endurance, and the ability to resist pressure or fear.

games.title: Will Surge
games.gameplayDescription: Tap rapidly to keep a willpower bar from collapsing while periodic surge waves spike the pressure until the timer ends.
games.fitReason: The clearest one-to-one mapping for a willpower check: endure, resist, and hold out without breaking.

games.title: 123 Wooden Man
games.gameplayDescription: Move forward during green light, freeze instantly when the light turns red; any movement during red light costs a penalty.
games.fitReason: The stop-go impulse control is a direct test of self-discipline — perfect for scenes about suppressing panic, staying still under threat, or not blowing your cover.

games.title: QTE Hold & Release
games.gameplayDescription: Hold to charge, wait for the exact release window, then let go at the right moment.
games.fitReason: Ideal when the dramatic core is restraint, patience, and not acting too early.

attributes.name: 智慧
attributes.summary: Logic, planning, spatial reasoning, and solving a problem faster than the environment closes in.

games.title: Conveyor Sort
games.gameplayDescription: Drag parcels from a moving conveyor into the correct bins before they fall off; speed increases and new categories appear over time.
games.fitReason: Fast classification under pressure — maps naturally to rapid analysis, prioritization, and sorting through information or evidence.

games.title: Parking Rush
games.gameplayDescription: Reposition vehicles or blockers in the right order to open a path with minimal wasted moves.
games.fitReason: Turns intelligence into practical planning and multi-step spatial problem solving instead of abstract trivia.

games.title: Maze Escape
games.gameplayDescription: Find the exit or key route through a maze while minimizing wrong turns and dead ends.
games.fitReason: Best for scenes built around searching, infiltration, scouting, or deciding the smartest path fast.

attributes.name: 魅力
attributes.summary: Presence, attraction, chemistry, rhythm, and controlling social or emotional attention.

games.title: Color Match
games.gameplayDescription: Read the color cue and tap the matching swatch as fast as possible; rounds speed up and distractors increase.
games.fitReason: Maps to reading social signals, matching someone's mood, and responding with the right emotional tone — a fast-paced empathy test.

games.title: Spotlight Seek
games.gameplayDescription: Sweep a spotlight through the dark to reveal the person or object that matters.
games.fitReason: Useful when charm is expressed as attention, recognition, eye contact, or becoming the focus in a crowd.

games.title: Stardew Fishing
games.gameplayDescription: Control a floating marker with careful holds and releases so it stays attached to a moving target zone.
games.fitReason: A strong metaphor for flirtation, conversational pacing, social tug-of-war, and keeping someone's attention without overcommitting.
